title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class AI model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The model includes built-in safety systems that restrict its capabilities in high-risk areas like cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, and distillation.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, a model the channel labels Mythos-class, with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It notes that the model ships with built-in safety systems that restrict its use in high-risk domains including cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, and distillation. The framing pairs broad multimodal and analytical reach with guardrails that cap performance where misuse risk is highest.
